source: R4 documentation IA audit plus repository markdown scan

policy.strategy: index-first; no mass rename until redirects and hot references are stable

current_clusters.role: agent profiles, memories, reports, operator handoffs
formal governance development evidence and historical phase packets
stale extracts, snapshots, superseded active docs
sprint, wave, REF, MAG, and phase plans
legacy audit folder to converge later
formal decision records and source governance docs
machine-readable inventory metadata and redirect plans
Codex operating rules, reports, and dispatch memory
generated legacy report sink outside docs taxonomy

target_taxonomy.purpose: curated active status, backlog, and active plan pointers
architecture overlays, ADRs, system boundary docs
REF, MAG, sprint, wave, and phase plans grouped by initiative
governance specs, amendments, registers, formal policies
role profiles, memories, reports, and operator copies
deploy, disaster, first-day-live, and healthcheck SOPs
stable technical background and external references
stale extracts, snapshots, and superseded plans
machine-readable inventories, redirect maps, and GUI source metadata

high.surface: Global Development Status, Live readiness, Governance panels
high.integration: parsed structured data then API endpoint
high.reason: P0/P1/P2 blockers, owners, gate timing, and active work are operator-critical

high.surface: Global Development Status, Live readiness, console contract
high.integration: parsed structured data; long-term DB/runtime facts should replace stale markdown
high.reason: current runtime state, root principles, live blockers, and deployment truth

high.integration: parsed structured data and OpenClaw status/self-state APIs
high.reason: MAG milestones, row-proof gates, and next multi-agent work

high.integration: static markdown reference plus structured phase metadata
high.reason: defines GUI console direction and expected operator surfaces

high.integration: static markdown reference plus structured phase metadata
high.reason: defines read-only gateway and supervisor relay sequencing

high.surface: Replay, Edge Gates, Global Development Status
high.integration: structured plan and runtime gate metadata
high.reason: active full-chain replay blockers and promotion gate state

phased_execution: Generate docs/_indexes/document_inventory.json and docs/_indexes/path_redirects.md before moving files.
Add front matter to active docs for status, kind, initiative, owner, supersedes, superseded_by, gui_surface, hot_interactive.
Build GUI from indexes and parsed active docs before moving hot paths.
Freeze CLAUDE.md, TODO.md, CONTEXT.md, AgentTodo.md, .codex/*, memory/*, and CCAgentWorkSpace reports until references are updated.
Move cold docs first: archive snapshots, generated .claude_reports, legacy docs/audit duplicates, obsolete execution-plan versions.
Leave redirect stubs at old paths for at least one release cycle.
Update root docs, role docs, code comments, and SQL comments only after redirect stubs settle.
risk_notes: Agent boot rules and dispatch files reference fixed paths.
SQL migrations and code comments cite execution plans and reports.
governance_dev has an explicit NAMING_NOTE advising against historical renames.
REF-20/REF-21 have many superseded versions; moving without status metadata will make stale plans look active.
CCAgentWorkSpace report paths are active role conventions.
